list.a: An online platform for managing animal shows: breeders keep kennel profiles, handlers submit entries, and organizers create events and publish results.
Dogs and cats under FCI and national rules to start with. The architecture is multi-species, so the list of breeds and judging systems will keep growing.

list.q: How do I enter a show?
list.a: Create a profile, add an animal, open the show calendar and submit an entry in one click. Entry status is visible in your dashboard.
Registration on the platform is free. The entry fee for a particular show is set by the organizer and shown in the event details.

list.q: Where can I see results and titles?
list.a: Show results, scores and awarded titles are published online and added to your animal's profile automatically.

list.q: How do I add a pedigree and a litter?
list.a: In your kennel profile add an animal, fill in its pedigree and, if needed, create a litter — the data is available when submitting entries and in the catalogue.

list.q: I'm an organizer. How do I create a show?
list.a: Organizers get an event management area: create a show, set up rings and classes, publish the schedule and the final results.
The interface is available in Russian and English; you can switch the language at any time in the settings.
